name: qellal
description: Qellal — Ethiopian tender alerts. A Ghost theme in the Signal design language: ink & paper, deadline-forward, tender listings as posts.

color_scheme.description: Light, Dark, or Auto (follow the visitor's device setting). Visitors can still flip it with the header toggle.

source_name.description: Name shown as the attribution source on tender cards and detail pages.

hero_heading.default: Never miss a tender deadline again

hero_subheading.description: Optional. Overrides the default homepage intro paragraph when set.

show_stats.description: Show the homepage stat strip (live tenders, categories, etc.).

show_category_browse.description: Show the "Browse by category" grid on the homepage.
